name: Asara Resources Limited
analysis: AS1 has all Fibonacci EMAs in full bullish alignment. Price making higher highs and higher lows — healthy uptrend structure. Price has pulled back and is testing the 21 EMA at A$0.1400. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
